steps.title: Identify the operation
steps.content: When a region is removed from a shape, the resulting area equals the original area minus the removed area.

steps.title: Calculate the remaining area
steps.content:
Rectangle P has area 56 square inches. We remove a rectangle with area 30 square inches. The resulting area is:
$$56 - 30 = 26 \text{ square inches}$$
This matches choice A — A is correct.
